log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Earth Genasi — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Earth Genasi — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Earth Genasi — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 20] MISS.

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.

══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Earth Genasi — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
